roadmap.title: Setup and universal achievements
roadmap.description: Complete the interface, party, Arcade, level, and general KO-streak tasks while learning the roster. Always finish matches so Steam can post completed conditions.

roadmap.title: Cumulative team and roster tasks
roadmap.description: Select heroes when the required Guardians, Avengers, X-Men, Mutants, or Fantastic Four members appear. Let these counters build across matches while pursuing other unlocks.

roadmap.title: Grouped-enemy and ultimate tasks
roadmap.description: Use objective fights, Doom Match, or coordinated crowd control to complete the single-cast hit, snare, bounce, and multi-KO requirements.

roadmap.title: Special conditions and map rotation
roadmap.description: Clean up the one-match, team-wipe, counterattack, portal, and map-specific achievements whenever their team compositions and maps appear.

roadmap.title: Long-term wins
roadmap.description: Continue playing eligible matchmaking modes until the cumulative total reaches 100 wins.

achievements.description: Upvote 1 player.
achievements.summary: Give another player a thumbs-up on the post-match results screen.

guide.context: A thumbs-up placed on the player's own card does not count.

steps.text: Finish any match and wait for the results screen that displays the MVP and both teams.
Click the @mechanic{thumbs-up} beneath any other player's card.

achievements.description: As Groot, imprison 4 enemies with a single use of Strangling Prison.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Groot}, catch four enemies with one @mechanic{Strangling Prison} ultimate.

guide.context: Only the number imprisoned by the same cast matters; Groot does not need to eliminate the targets.

steps.text: Charge @mechanic{Strangling Prison} and wait for four enemies to group on the objective or payload.
Aim at the center of the group and cast the ultimate so all four enemies are pulled into the prison.

achievements.description: Use the customizable wheel once.
achievements.summary: Use an emote or spray from the customizable wheel during a match.

guide.context: The Steam unlock may not appear until the match ends.

steps.text: During a match, hold @mechanic{T} to open the customizable communication wheel.
Move the pointer over an emote or spray, release @mechanic{T} to use the selection, and finish the match.

achievements.description: Reach level 20.
achievements.summary: Earn match experience until the account reaches level 20.

guide.context: Account levels are cumulative; short Conquest matches are useful while other hero achievements are in progress.

steps.text: Complete matches to earn account XP.
Continue until the profile level changes to 20.

achievements.description: Land a 3-player KO streak.
achievements.summary: Secure three enemy KOs in rapid succession with any hero.

guide.context: Galacta announces the two-KO point, which is the cue to find the third target before the streak window closes.

steps.text: Join a fight where several enemies are already low on health.
Finish three enemies one after another without allowing the KO-streak timer to expire.

achievements.description: As the Punisher, land 3 KOs amidst the smoke of Scourge Grenade in a single game.
achievements.summary: As @npc{the Punisher}, earn three final-hit KOs inside @mechanic{Scourge Grenade} smoke during one match.

guide.context: The smoke dissipates quickly, and the grenade's initial damage is unreliable for credit; each KO may come from a different grenade.

steps.text: Equip the shotgun and reduce a low-health enemy until one close-range shot will finish the target.
Fire @mechanic{Scourge Grenade} at that enemy's feet, recover from the recoil, and land the final shotgun blast while the smoke remains.
Repeat the smoke-assisted final hit on two more enemies before the match ends, then complete the match.

achievements.description: As Rocket Raccoon, revive the Guardians of the Galaxy members 5 times.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Rocket Raccoon}, revive allied Guardians of the Galaxy five cumulative times with @item{B.R.B.}.

guide.context: Star-Lord, Groot, Mantis, and Adam Warlock qualify. B.R.B. handles one revive, disappears if Rocket dies, and then enters cooldown.

steps.text: Select @npc{Rocket Raccoon} when at least one qualifying Guardian is on the team.
Place @item{B.R.B.} in a protected position near the fight before the Guardian is eliminated.
Allow the beacon to revive the Guardian, then repeat until five qualifying revives have accumulated.

achievements.description: As Adam Warlock, forge a soul bond with 3 allies from the Guardians of the Galaxy.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Adam Warlock}, link three different allied Guardians at once with @mechanic{Soul Bond} after a match starts.

guide.context: Star-Lord, Groot, Rocket Raccoon, and Mantis qualify; linking one Guardian on three occasions does not satisfy the requirement.

steps.text: Form or find a team containing at least three of @npc{Star-Lord}, @npc{Groot}, @npc{Rocket Raccoon}, and @npc{Mantis}.
Leave the spawn room after the objective becomes active and group beside the three Guardians.
Cast @mechanic{Soul Bond} while all three qualifying allies are within its link range.

achievements.description: Win 100 matches.
achievements.summary: Reach a cumulative total of 100 match victories.

guide.context: The large win requirement makes this the long-term cleanup task after the hero-specific achievements.

steps.text: Win matches and remain through each results screen.
Continue until the victory total reaches 100.

achievements.description: Team up with a friend for a match.
achievements.summary: Complete a match while grouped with a player who was already on the Steam friends list.

guide.context: The other player must be a friend before matchmaking begins and must enter on the same team.

steps.text: Add the partner on Steam, invite the partner to the in-game party, and queue together.
Remain in the party and complete the match on the same team.

achievements.description: Complete 1 Arcade match.
achievements.summary: Select Arcade from the Play menu and complete one Arcade match.

guide.context: Winning is unnecessary; only reaching the end of the selected Arcade match matters.

steps.text: Open @mechanic{Play}, select the current mode button, and change @mechanic{Quick Match} to @mechanic{Arcade}.
Queue for any available Arcade mode and stay until its results screen.

achievements.description: As Bruce Banner, land 1 KO within 3 seconds of calming down from the Hulk to Banner.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Bruce Banner}, finish an enemy within three seconds of reverting from Hulk to Banner.

guide.context: The three-second window begins when Hulk is knocked out and Banner regains control, so a nearly defeated enemy must already be nearby.

steps.text: As @npc{Hulk}, pressure an enemy until the target is almost defeated while Hulk's health is also low.
When Hulk reverts, immediately aim @npc{Bruce Banner}'s pistol or @mechanic{Gamma Grenade} at the low-health target.
Land the final hit before three seconds elapse.

achievements.description: As Storm, assist X-Men members 10 times.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Storm}, assist X-Men allies in ten cumulative KOs by damaging targets or buffing the qualifying ally.

guide.context: Qualifying allies include Wolverine, Rogue, Magneto, Magik, Emma Frost, Gambit, Namor, Phoenix, Psylocke, and Deadpool; progress persists across matches.

steps.text: Select @npc{Storm} when at least one qualifying X-Men member is on the team.
Damage the ally's target or apply Storm's @mechanic{E} or @mechanic{Shift} buff before that ally earns the KO.
Accumulate ten credited assists across eligible matches.

achievements.description: As Loki, land one KO by stabbing from behind.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Loki}, land a final-hit @mechanic{Backstab} melee on an enemy's back.

guide.context: Invisibility helps with positioning but is not a requirement; the decisive conditions are Loki's melee attack and contact with the target's back.

steps.text: Reduce an enemy to the point where one melee strike will secure the KO.
Use invisibility or cover to move directly behind the target.
Press @mechanic{V} and make Loki's dagger land the final hit on the enemy's back.

achievements.description: As Doctor Strange, land 1 terrain KO with the portal.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Doctor Strange}, send an enemy through a portal and off the map for a terrain KO.

guide.context: Convoy defense offers predictable attacker routes, letting the paired endpoints turn an enemy's usual path into a fall beyond the map edge.

steps.text: On a map with an open edge, place one portal endpoint beyond the safe floor.
Place the paired endpoint on an enemy route, such as near the attacker spawn exit, or retreat through it while an enemy chases.
Keep the portal open until the enemy enters and the fall is credited to @npc{Doctor Strange}.

achievements.description: As Mantis, assist allies in achieving a team wipe.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Mantis}, contribute damage, healing, or a buff while the team eliminates every opponent before anyone respawns.

guide.context: The completed wipe displays @mechanic{ACE}; merely being present during the fight is insufficient for assist credit.

steps.text: Enter a coordinated team fight as @npc{Mantis} and keep allies healed.
Damage at least one enemy or apply a damage boost to an ally before that ally earns a KO.
Keep supporting until the team eliminates every opponent and the @mechanic{ACE} message appears.

achievements.description: As Hawkeye, partner with the Avengers to land 10 KOs.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Hawkeye}, secure ten cumulative KOs on enemies also damaged by allied Avengers.

guide.context: Avengers partners include Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, Black Panther, Blade, Doctor Strange, Scarlet Witch, and Winter Soldier.

steps.text: Select @npc{Hawkeye} when a qualifying Avenger is on the team.
Focus the same enemy as that ally and land Hawkeye's final hit after the ally contributes damage.
Repeat until ten qualifying KOs have accumulated across matches.

achievements.description: As Captain America, land 3 KOs with a single use of Freedom Charge.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Captain America}, secure three KOs during one activation of @mechanic{Freedom Charge}.

guide.context: Freedom Charge lasts about ten seconds, so activating it after enemies are weakened gives Captain America time to finish three targets.

steps.text: Wait until three nearby enemies are low on health or held by allied crowd control.
Activate @mechanic{Freedom Charge} and immediately pursue the weakest target.
Secure three KOs before the same Freedom Charge activation expires.

achievements.description: As Hela, land a 3-player KO streak in Yggsgard: Yggdrasill Path.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Hela}, earn a rapid three-player KO streak on @loc{Yggsgard: Yggdrasill Path}.

guide.context: Yggdrasill Path appears in Convoy rotation; other Yggsgard variants do not satisfy the location requirement.

steps.text: Queue until @loc{Yggsgard: Yggdrasill Path} loads, then select @npc{Hela}.
Charge Hela's ultimate and wait for several enemies to group or become low.
Secure three KOs in rapid succession before the streak window closes.

achievements.description: As Cloak & Dagger, assist allies in achieving a team wipe.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Cloak & Dagger}, contribute damage, healing, or a buff while the team eliminates every opponent before anyone respawns.

guide.context: The completed wipe displays @mechanic{ACE}; passive presence does not establish assist credit.

steps.text: Stay with the team as @npc{Cloak & Dagger} during a full engagement.
Damage an enemy or heal or buff an ally who earns a KO.
Continue supporting until all opponents are eliminated and @mechanic{ACE} appears.

achievements.description: As Black Panther, land a 3-player KO streak in the Intergalactic Empire of Wakanda: Hall of Djalia.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Black Panther}, earn a rapid three-player KO streak on @loc{Hall of Djalia}.

guide.context: Only the Hall of Djalia variant of Intergalactic Empire of Wakanda qualifies; Birnin T'Challa does not.

steps.text: Wait for matchmaking to load @loc{Hall of Djalia} in the Intergalactic Empire of Wakanda, then select @npc{Black Panther}.
Enter a fight after several enemies have been weakened.
Secure three KOs in rapid succession before the streak window closes.

achievements.description: As Magik, land 3 KOs within a single transformation into Darkchild.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Magik}, secure three KOs during one approximately 12-second @mechanic{Darkchild} transformation.

guide.context: The short transformation makes a cleanup engage against already damaged enemies more reliable than opening a fight with Darkchild.

steps.text: Wait until three nearby enemies are damaged and the team fight is committed.
Activate @mechanic{Darkchild} and use Magik's transformed abilities on the weakest targets.
Secure three KOs before Magik returns to normal form.

achievements.description: As Moon Knight, hit 4 enemies with a single use of Hand of Khonshu.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Moon Knight}, hit four enemies with one @mechanic{Hand of Khonshu} ultimate.

guide.context: Eliminations are unnecessary, so the best opportunity is a four-player cluster on an objective or payload.

steps.text: Charge @mechanic{Hand of Khonshu} and watch for four enemies occupying the same small area.
Center the ultimate on the group and keep the impact area over all four targets.

achievements.description: As Luna Snow, complete a match on 5 maps with different themes.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Luna Snow}, finish matches on five maps with different themes.

guide.context: Wins are unnecessary and the theme counter persists between matches, making this a passive map-rotation task.

steps.text: Select @npc{Luna Snow} whenever a map from a new theme appears.
Finish the match so that theme is recorded.
Repeat on four additional map themes.

achievements.description: As Squirrel Girl, land 3 KOs with a single use of Unbeatable Squirrel Tsunami.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Squirrel Girl}, earn three KOs from one @mechanic{Unbeatable Squirrel Tsunami} ultimate.

guide.context: Grouped low-health enemies and allied crowd control give the single ultimate enough time to produce all three KOs.

steps.text: Wait until at least three nearby enemies are weakened and grouped, preferably inside allied crowd control.
Launch @mechanic{Unbeatable Squirrel Tsunami} through the group.
Keep pressure on the same targets until the single ultimate produces three credited KOs.

achievements.description: As Black Widow, land 3 KOs with critical hits in a single match.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Black Widow}, secure three headshot final hits during one match.

guide.context: A critical hit that does not finish the target is insufficient; high ground and weakened support targets provide cleaner final-hit opportunities.

steps.text: Position behind the frontline or on high ground with a clear view of damaged enemies.
Aim at an enemy's head and land the shot that empties the target's remaining health.
Repeat for two more headshot final hits before the match ends.

achievements.description: As Iron Man, hit 4 enemies with a single use of Invincible Pulse Cannon.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Iron Man}, hit four enemies with one @mechanic{Invincible Pulse Cannon} projectile.

guide.context: Eliminations are unnecessary, so Iron Man only needs four enemies to occupy the projectile's impact area.

steps.text: Fly above or beside an objective where four enemies are aligned closely.
Aim @mechanic{Invincible Pulse Cannon} at the center of the group so the same shot hits all four.

achievements.description: As Venom, snare 4 enemies with a single use of Cellular Corrosion.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Venom}, snare four enemies within one cast of @mechanic{Cellular Corrosion}.

guide.context: Cellular Corrosion has roughly an eight-metre tether range, so Venom must enter the enemy cluster before casting.

steps.text: Wait for four enemies to group on an objective or payload.
Swing or dive into the center until all four are within close range.
Activate @mechanic{Cellular Corrosion} once and keep all four enemies tethered by that cast.

achievements.description: As Spider-Man, detect an enemy with Spider-Sense and land a winning counterattack.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Spider-Man}, KO the enemy whose off-screen presence triggered @mechanic{Spider-Sense}.

guide.context: The white burst around Spider-Man's head signals a nearby enemy outside the camera view; the counterattack must defeat that detected target.

steps.text: Move through a contested area while watching for the white @mechanic{Spider-Sense} effect.
Immediately turn toward the direction of the off-screen threat and identify the nearby enemy.
Chase and secure the KO on that same enemy.

achievements.description: As Magneto, assist Mutant allies 10 times.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Magneto}, assist Mutant allies in ten cumulative KOs by shielding them before their eliminations.

guide.context: Qualifying allies include Storm, Namor, Wolverine, Psylocke, Magik, Rogue, Deadpool, Emma Frost, and Phoenix; progress persists across matches.

steps.text: Select @npc{Magneto} when a qualifying Mutant is on the team.
Apply @mechanic{Metal Bulwark} with E to that ally before the ally earns a KO.
Repeat until shielded Mutant allies have earned ten credited KOs.

achievements.description: As Scarlet Witch, take down Mutant enemies 10 times.
achievements.summary: While playing @npc{Scarlet Witch}, earn credit for ten cumulative takedowns against Mutant opponents.

guide.context: Eligible targets include Storm, Magneto, Namor, Wolverine, Psylocke, Magik, Rogue, Emma Frost, Phoenix, Gambit, and Deadpool.

steps.text: Select @npc{Scarlet Witch} when the opposing team contains a qualifying Mutant.
Focus that enemy and contribute enough damage to receive takedown credit.
Accumulate ten Mutant takedowns across eligible matches.

achievements.description: As Thor, strike down 4 enemies with a single use of God of Thunder.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Thor}, hit four enemies with one @mechanic{God of Thunder} landing.

guide.context: The cast has a visible windup; launching from the ground maximizes the useful area, and eliminations are unnecessary.

steps.text: Charge @mechanic{God of Thunder} and wait for four enemies to cluster on an objective or payload.
Activate the ultimate from ground level and place the landing marker at the group's center.
Complete the landing before the four enemies leave the impact area.

achievements.description: As Winter Soldier, land 3 KOs with a single use of Kraken Impact.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Winter Soldier}, KO three @mechanic{Culling}-marked enemies through refreshed @mechanic{Kraken Impact} casts in one sequence.

guide.context: Kraken Impact applies Culling to enemies it hits. A marked enemy's KO refreshes the ultimate for eight seconds; failing to earn another marked KO ends the chain.

steps.text: Cast @mechanic{Kraken Impact} on a low-health enemy so the hit applies @mechanic{Culling}, then secure that marked target's KO.
Use the refreshed ultimate on another low-health enemy and KO the newly marked target before the eight-second refresh expires.
Repeat once more so the same refresh chain reaches three marked-target KOs.

achievements.description: As Peni Parker, blast 3 enemies with a single use of Arachno-Mine.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Peni Parker}, blast three enemies with one @item{Arachno-Mine} detonation chain.

guide.context: A predictable grouped route, such as an attacker spawn exit on Convoy defense, gives one mine cluster the best chance to catch three players.

steps.text: On Convoy defense, place a @mechanic{Cyber-Web} along the route from the attacker spawn or another narrow choke.
Stack @item{Arachno-Mines} together inside the web before enemies arrive.
Let three enemies enter the mine cluster together so one chain blasts all three.

achievements.description: As Star-Lord, land 10 KOs with assists from the Guardians of the Galaxy.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Star-Lord}, secure ten cumulative final-hit KOs on enemies damaged by allied Guardians.

guide.context: Rocket Raccoon, Groot, Mantis, and Adam Warlock qualify as assisting Guardians; progress persists across matches.

steps.text: Select @npc{Star-Lord} when a qualifying Guardian is on the team.
Focus the same enemy as that ally and wait for the Guardian to contribute damage.
Land Star-Lord's final hit and repeat until ten qualifying KOs have accumulated.

achievements.description: As Namor, summon Monstro Spawn to land 10 KOs in a single game.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Namor}, secure ten KOs in one match after @npc{Monstro Spawn} damages each target.

guide.context: Monstro Spawn disappear when Namor dies, so preserving Namor's life protects both turret uptime and the one-match counter.

steps.text: Place @npc{Monstro Spawn} where the summons can fire into a sustained objective fight.
Attack an enemy after a summon damages the target and land Namor's final hit.
Keep replacing the summons and repeat until ten qualifying KOs are earned before the match ends.

achievements.description: As Jeff the Land Shark, swallow 4 enemies with a single use of It's Jeff!
achievements.summary: As @npc{Jeff the Land Shark}, swallow four enemies with one @mechanic{It's Jeff!} ultimate.

guide.context: The achievement checks the four-player swallow itself; Jeff does not need to eliminate or throw the captured enemies off the map.

steps.text: Charge @mechanic{It's Jeff!} and use @mechanic{Hide and Seek} to approach an objective fight.
Wait until four enemies occupy the ultimate's targeting area.
Activate @mechanic{It's Jeff!} and pass over all four enemies during the same swallow.

achievements.description: As Psylocke, contest the mission area for 60 seconds in a single match.
achievements.summary: While playing @npc{Psylocke}, accumulate 60 seconds inside a contested mission area during one match.

guide.context: Contest time advances only while at least one ally and one enemy share the mission area; the full minute need not be continuous.

steps.text: Enter the active objective while both teams have a player inside it.
Use @mechanic{Psychic Stealth} and cover to survive without leaving the mission area.
Return after deaths or retreats until the contested time reaches 60 seconds in that match.

achievements.description: As Wolverine, land 3 KOs with a single use of Last Stand.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Wolverine}, secure three final-hit KOs during one @mechanic{Last Stand} sequence.

guide.context: Last Stand uses a launch-and-landing sequence, and the final hits must belong to Wolverine; allied crowd control makes the landing easier to place.

steps.text: Practice both inputs of @mechanic{Last Stand}, then wait for three grouped enemies to become low.
Activate the launch, aim the landing into the group, and complete the second input.
Finish all three affected enemies before that ultimate sequence ends.

achievements.description: As Iron Fist, land 3 KOs with a single use of Living Chi.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Iron Fist}, secure three KOs during one @mechanic{Living Chi} ultimate.

guide.context: Living Chi is most reliable as a cleanup engage against a damaged backline, after enemy defensive support ultimates have been spent.

steps.text: Flank until three enemy backline targets are damaged and occupied by the team fight.
Activate @mechanic{Living Chi} and focus the weakest target first.
Secure three KOs before the same ultimate expires.

achievements.description: As Mister Fantastic, bounce 5 times with a single use of Brainiac Bounce.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Mister Fantastic}, complete five bounces during one @mechanic{Brainiac Bounce} ultimate.

guide.context: The initial sequence extends when a landing hits an enemy; missing nearby targets on successive bounces ends the ultimate early.

steps.text: Activate @mechanic{Brainiac Bounce} above a cluster of enemies.
Steer each landing onto an enemy to earn an additional bounce.
Continue landing on targets until the same ultimate completes its fifth bounce.

achievements.description: As Invisible Woman, assist the Fantastic Four members 10 times.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Invisible Woman}, assist Fantastic Four allies in ten cumulative KOs.

guide.context: Mister Fantastic, Human Torch, and The Thing qualify; shielding, healing, or damaging the ally's target can establish assist credit.

steps.text: Select @npc{Invisible Woman} when a qualifying Fantastic Four member is on the team.
Heal or shield that ally before the ally earns a KO, or damage the enemy the ally finishes.
Accumulate ten qualifying assists across matches.

achievements.description: As Human Torch, land 3 KOs with a single use of Supernova.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Human Torch}, secure three final-hit KOs during one @mechanic{Supernova} ultimate.

guide.context: Supernova empowers Human Torch's fire attacks for about eight seconds and converts Plasma Blast into Flame Tornado; assists do not count.

steps.text: Move close to three grouped low-health enemies before activating @mechanic{Supernova}.
Use the opening heatwave, then cast the empowered @mechanic{Flame Tornado} into the group.
Land three final-hit KOs before that Supernova activation expires.

achievements.description: As the Thing, knock up 4 enemies with a single use of Clobberin' Time.
achievements.summary: Select @npc{The⁠ Thing (Ben Grimm)} and knock four enemies upward with one @mechanic{Clobberin' Time} shockwave.

guide.context: The ultimate has a windup and travels in a relatively narrow line, so allied crowd control prevents the four targets from sidestepping it.

steps.text: Wait until four enemies align on an objective or become trapped by allied crowd control.
Aim @mechanic{Clobberin' Time} along the full line of targets.
Release the shockwave so the same cast launches all four; KOs are unnecessary.

achievements.description: As Emma Frost, force mutants to move 10 times with Psionic Seduction.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Emma Frost}, force Mutant enemies to move with @mechanic{Psionic Seduction} ten cumulative times.

guide.context: Eligible targets include Storm, Magneto, Namor, Wolverine, Psylocke, Magik, Rogue, enemy Emma Frost, Phoenix, and Deadpool; progress persists across matches.

steps.text: Select @npc{Emma Frost} when the enemy team contains a qualifying Mutant.
Charge @mechanic{Psionic Seduction}, aim its cone through as many qualifying targets as possible, and cast it.
Repeat until ten Mutant targets have been forced to walk toward Emma Frost.

achievements.description: As Ultron, take down Avengers members 10 times.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Ultron}, contribute damage to ten cumulative takedowns of Avengers enemies.

guide.context: Confirmed targets include Hawkeye, Iron Man, Black Widow, Hulk, Captain America, and Thor; assist credit is sufficient and persists across matches.

steps.text: Select @npc{Ultron} when the opposing team contains a confirmed Avenger.
Damage that Avenger before an ally finishes the elimination.
Accumulate ten credited Avengers takedowns across matches.

achievements.description: As Phoenix, strike 4 enemies with a single Endsong Inferno landing.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Phoenix}, strike four enemies with one @mechanic{Endsong Inferno} landing.

guide.context: The achievement checks the landing impact rather than KOs, making a dense objective or large-team fight the best target.

steps.text: Charge @mechanic{Endsong Inferno} and rise above a group of at least four enemies.
Aim the dive at the group's center and complete the landing so its impact touches all four.

achievements.description: As Blade, land a 3-player KO streak in Empire of Eternal Night: Central Park.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Blade}, earn a rapid three-player KO streak on @loc{Empire of Eternal Night: Central Park}.

guide.context: Central Park appears in Convergence rotation; the Empire of Eternal Night: Midtown map does not qualify.

steps.text: Queue Convergence until @loc{Empire of Eternal Night: Central Park} loads, then select @npc{Blade}.
Enter a team fight after several enemies have been weakened.
Secure three KOs in rapid succession before the streak window closes.

achievements.description: As Angela, snare 4 enemies with a single use of Heven's Retribution.
achievements.summary: As @npc{Angela}, snare four enemies with one @mechanic{Heven's Retribution} ultimate.

guide.context: Overtime and objective fights naturally compress teams; Assassin's Charge can also push one pair toward another before the cast.

steps.text: Save @mechanic{Heven's Retribution} until four enemies are grouped on an objective or during overtime.
If needed, use @mechanic{Assassin's Charge} to drive nearby enemies toward the cluster.
Cast @mechanic{Heven's Retribution} at the center so the same ultimate snares all four; KOs are unnecessary.
